name: agent-looping-pattern
description: doc-summarizer traces are hitting 25-30 tool call steps when normal is 5-8. 40% of traces affected in the last 4 hours. The agent is retrying the same operation in a loop.
projectMemory:
## Project Agents
- **customer-support-bot**: Handles customer inquiries via RAG. Typical trace has 3-5 LLM calls, 1-2 retrieval steps. Normal latency: 2-4s per trace.
- **email-classifier**: Classifies incoming emails. Single LLM call per trace, ~500ms.
- **doc-summarizer**: Summarizes uploaded documents. 2-3 LLM calls, varies by doc length. Normal latency: 5-15s.

## Baselines
- Error rate: <2%
- Daily cost: ~$8
- Trace volume: ~300/day
- customer-support-bot: ~150/day
- email-classifier: ~100/day
- doc-summarizer: ~50/day

looping_span_analysis.span_output_pattern: consecutive calls with same input parameters — agent retries parsing the same document section

cost.note: looping traces cost ~8x more than normal traces
